nasb.text: “So I sent messengers from the wilderness of Kedemoth to Sihon king of Heshbon with words of peace, saying,

esv.text: “So I sent messengers from the wilderness of Kedemoth to Sihon the king of Heshbon, with words of peace, saying,

cnv.text: “我從基底莫的曠野，派使者到希實本王西宏那裡去，用和平的話說：

ccb.text: “于是，我从基底莫旷野派使者去见希实本王西宏，提出和平的建议，说，
